ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemicals" (
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical */,
  "chemical_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* CAS number of the chemical */,
  "weight_percentage" REAL /* Weight percentage of the chemical in formulations */,
  "acgih_tlv_twa" TEXT /* ACGIH TLV-TWA value for the chemical */,
  "acgih_tlv_stel" TEXT /* ACGIH TLV-STEL value for the chemical */,
  "osha_pel_twa" TEXT /* OSHA PEL-TWA value for the chemical */,
  "osha_pel_ceiling" TEXT /* OSHA ceiling limit for the chemical */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Formula of the chemical */,
  "hazard_class" TEXT /* Classification of the chemical's hazard */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions required for storing the chemical safely */,
  "msds_id" TEXT /* Reference to the Material Safety Data Sheet (MSDS) for legacy systems */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the chemical record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the chemical record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_data_sheets" (
  "sds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SDS record */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chemical associated with the SDS */,
  "sds_path" TEXT /* File path to the SDS document */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the SDS was last revised */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the SDS */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the SDS was published */,
  "manufacturer_info" TEXT /* Information about the manufacturer */,
  "emergency_phone" TEXT /* Emergency contact number for the manufacturer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the SDS record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the SDS record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_data_sheets_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chemical in inventory */,
  "quantity_on_hand" REAL /* Quantity of chemical currently in stock */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the quantity (e.g., kg, liters) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location within the facility where the chemical is stored */,
  "min_stock_level" REAL /* Minimum stock level to trigger a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" REAL /* Quantity to reorder when the stock level falls below the minimum */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the chemical batch */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the chemical */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_inventory_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exposure_records" (
  "exposure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exposure record */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chemical involved in the exposure */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee exposed to the chemical */,
  "exposure_level" REAL /* Measured exposure level of the chemical */,
  "exposure_date" TEXT /* Date of the exposure event */,
  "exposure_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the exposure event */,
  "exposure_type" TEXT /* Type of exposure (e.g., inhalation, skin contact) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the exposure occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the exposure record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the exposure record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exposure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exposure_records_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., operator, technician, safety officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee works in */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the employee record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the employee record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chemical involved in the incident */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee involved in the incident */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., spill, overexposure) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the incident (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the incident occurred */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time taken to respond to the incident */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the incident record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the incident record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemicals ("chemical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_training_records" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who completed the training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the training was completed */,
  "training_type" TEXT /* Type of training completed (e.g., chemical handling, emergency response) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the training expires and needs renewal */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training session */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer who conducted the training */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the training record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the training record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_training_records_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_training_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection record */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the inspection was conducted */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who conducted the inspection */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings from the inspection */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the inspection */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of inspection (e.g., routine, special) */,
  "inspection_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the inspection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the inspection record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the inspection record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification held by the inspector */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the inspector works in */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the inspector was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the inspector was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the inspector record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the inspector record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the compliance report */,
  "generated_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance report (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  "period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "period_end" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the report record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_generated_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where a change occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the record that was changed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the audit log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
